headline: Oil Prices Rise As Trump's 10-Day Clock Ticks Toward Energy Shock
summary: U.S. crude oil prices climbed early Friday even after President Trump gave another 10 days for Iran negotiations to show progress before ordering the next military move.  For markets, that points to longer disruption of indispensable exports through the Strait of Hormuz and no clear idea about when or how this crisis will end.  The extension of Trump's cease-fire appears to diminish the risk that the conflict will escalate over the weekend.
